meta.title: 1CYBER — Security Testing for Your Business
meta.description: We test websites, mobile apps and servers for vulnerabilities. Free audit — pay only for confirmed findings. Astana, Kazakhstan.

hero.headline: We hack your business — so criminals can't
hero.sub:
Free security audit for your websites, apps and servers.
You only pay if we find real vulnerabilities.

findings.title: What we find in companies like yours

items.name: Customer data leaks
items.desc: Names, phone numbers, payment details — accessible to anyone without a password. This means fines and loss of customer trust.

items.name: Payment system keys exposed
items.desc: Secret keys for Kaspi, Stripe or other payment systems found in open access. Attackers can make transactions on your behalf.

items.name: Full server access
items.desc: Weak passwords or open databases let attackers take complete control — read, modify, or delete all your data.

items.name: Source code exposed
items.desc: Your application code is publicly accessible. Attackers study it to find every weak point and exploit them.

items.name: Unauthorized actions
items.desc: Anyone can create orders, change prices, modify accounts — without logging in. Real cases we find regularly.

items.name: Legal violations
items.desc: Personal data stored or transmitted insecurely. Under Kazakhstan and international law, this means significant fines.

items.name: Websites & web apps
items.desc: Online stores, CRM systems, customer portals, corporate websites — any web service your business runs

items.name: Mobile applications
items.desc: Android & iOS app analysis: how data is stored, network traffic security, API vulnerabilities, tamper protection

items.name: Servers & cloud
items.desc: Servers, databases, cloud infrastructure — everything accessible from the internet that attackers can target

steps.name: Sign documents
steps.desc: We sign NDA + Authorization to Test. This protects both sides legally. No work begins without your written permission.

steps.name: Security testing
steps.desc: Our team tests your systems exactly like real attackers would — but safely and within the agreed scope.

steps.name: Report with proof
steps.desc: You receive a detailed report. Every vulnerability comes with a working proof-of-concept (PoC) — real evidence, not guesswork.

steps.name: You verify everything
steps.desc: Your team checks each PoC. You confirm which findings are valid. We sign an acceptance act together.

steps.name: Payment
steps.desc: You pay only for confirmed vulnerabilities based on severity. Payment within 30 days after the acceptance act.

steps.name: Ongoing protection
steps.desc: Subscribe to annual monitoring — we check every month that new code changes haven't introduced new vulnerabilities.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.currency_note: Prices in USD. We accept payment in KZT and RUB at the current exchange rate.

planA.name: PAY PER FINDING
planA.desc: Free security audit. You only pay for confirmed vulnerabilities — each one delivered with a working proof-of-concept.
points: Pay only for confirmed findings with PoC
Severity rated by international CVSS 3.1 standard
10% discount for a public testimonial or case study

planB.name: SECURITY PARTNER
planB.desc: Full security coverage. Initial audit + monthly monitoring. All findings from the initial audit are included free.
points: Full initial pentest — findings included for free
Monthly security checks of new code & changes
Priority support & 24h response for critical issues

tiers.title: Price per confirmed finding
tiers.subtitle: Only applies to Pay Per Finding plan

comparison.title: Which plan is right for you?
comparison.payPerFinding: You need a one-time check and want to know your current security level
comparison.subscription: You want continuous protection — we check every month that your developers haven't introduced new vulnerabilities

portfolio.title: Our work
portfolio.desc: We follow responsible disclosure — like Google Project Zero. After finding vulnerabilities through bug bounty programs (HackerOne, Bugcrowd), we publish detailed case studies after a 90-day disclosure period.
portfolio.coming_desc: Our first reports are currently in the 90-day disclosure period. Detailed write-ups with technical analysis will be published here.

contact.title: Request a free audit
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Request sent. We will contact you within 24 hours.

dogovor.title: Security Testing Agreement
dogovor.subtitle: Includes NDA, Authorization to Test, and Service Terms. Download, fill in your company details and sign.
